{{Infobox group
| name = Champion’s Guild
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Champion’s Guild Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Champion]]’s [[Guild]] is one of the ten influential [[Imperial Guilds]] and serves as the second oldest, following only the [[Consultants]]. Historically, the guild has had a massive impact on the unification of the [[Empire]], with legendary strategists claiming that victory is certain if a [[Champion]] is secured for a cause. The guild's symbol is the [[Golden Crown]], and its members are known for being more loyal to the [[Empire]] than other guilds. However, following the death of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]], the guild faced a crisis of purpose and internal division regarding its role in governing or supporting the [[Regents]]. Members of the guild, known as [[Champions]], are distinct from standard [[Soulbound]] individuals. They undergo a secret and intensive process starting in childhood that involves abusive combat training and alchemical treatments designed to enhance their physical and mental capabilities. These treatments result in superhuman warriors capable of immense feats of strength, such as fighting giant creatures with their bare hands. Because the specific alchemical formulas used to create them are proprietary secrets, [[Champion blood]] is considered a highly valuable prize. The guild has recently faced significant instability, including a shortage of alchemists and the eventual decision by its leader, [[Baldesar Kern]], to dissolve the organization. While [[Kern]] intended for the guild to cease existing, leaving only individual [[Champions]] behind, some regional leaders have attempted to rebuild their own versions of the guild to assert power.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Champions]] are members of the [[Champion’s Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] was a former member of the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]] uses the [[Golden Crown]] as its symbol.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Champion’s Guild]] is headquartered in [[Axciss]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Baldesar Kern]] is the Head of the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Champion]]’s [[Guild]] maintains a staff of alchemists and provides blood samples to support various alchemical research efforts. During her time spent within the organization, [[Petal]] managed to secure a specific research position. However, the guild has largely dispersed and no longer offers its full support to [[Calder]]. This fragmentation has left the group as one of the entities most heavily impacted by the recent departure of its alchemists.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Champion’s Guild]] provides blood samples for alchemical research.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] found a research position in the [[Champion’s Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Champion’s Guild]] is not fully behind [[Calder]] and has largely dispersed.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Champion’s Guild]] is one of the groups most affected by the departure of the alchemists.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] spent time in the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]] has alchemists.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Champion’s Guild]] provides open security for the Imperialist side.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Head of the Champion’s Guild]] is a broad man with silver in his black hair.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Head of the Champion’s Guild]] carries a leather satchel and two maces.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Urzaia Woodsman,” she recited. “Former member of the Champion’s Guild, exiled in bad standing, forced to serve a term in an Izyrian arena until his debt to the Imperial throne was cleared, or until his death.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“This is a sample of blood provided by the Champion’s Guild, preserved in a fresh liquid state.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
